changes: Track time per task with start/stop timers; progress is saved continuously.
Set a time goal for each task and get a desktop notification (with an optional looping alarm sound) once it is reached.
Organize tasks with colors, edit them, reset their time, and archive the ones you are done with.
See general statistics: per-task totals (time spent, goal completeness, and involvement) shown in a table and pie charts.
Dig into detailed statistics: a yearly activity heat map, a weekly calendar, and a weekday distribution.
Create and switch between multiple bees; the last active bee is remembered between launches.
Use the interface in 15 languages, switchable on the fly.
All data is stored locally in a SQLite database under %APPDATA%/BeeTrack; the app works fully offline.
Move database and config to the %APPDATA%/Beetrack folder.
Show critical notifications on failed requests.
Changelog added.
Fixed bug with app icon and timer sound.
Fixed timezone bugs.
Fixed various of small bugs.
Focus on invalid form fields.
Added the "About BeeTrack" window with author info, version and a link to GitHub.
Added over a dozen interface languages.
Added weekday distribution to the detailed statistics.
Header and footer are now fixed in place, and the window opens maximized.
The date when it all started. Empty application.
